name: Montana Capital Car Title Loans
description_short: New Orleans, LA car title loans at Montana Capital Car Title Loans, 2645 N Miro St, offer quick cash solutions.
description_long:
Montana Capital Car Title Loans operates from a standalone storefront at 2645 N Miro Street in New Orleans, LA, serving customers throughout the city. The location is conveniently situated for Mid-City residents and is open Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM, Saturday from 10AM to 5PM, and closed Sundays. This New Orleans branch provides straightforward access to car title loans when you need quick funding.

At the New Orleans location on N Miro Street, you can explore car title loans that use your vehicle's title as collateral to provide fast access to cash. The team at this branch can be reached at +1 504-688-7670 to discuss loan terms, explain the application process, and answer your questions about how title loans work in LA. Whether you're facing an unexpected expense or need emergency funds, the staff here are ready to help.

When visiting this New Orleans store, bring a valid photo ID, your vehicle title, and proof of local residency to move through the process smoothly. Title loans can be a fast alternative for New Orleans-area residents who need cash quickly without lengthy bank approval waits. Montana Capital Car Title Loans has established itself as a trusted choice for car title lending in the New Orleans community.
address: 2645 N Miro St, New Orleans, LA 70117

company_info.headquarters: 2645 N Miro St, New Orleans, LA 70117

pros: Same-day funding available; multiple customer reviews confirm cash received within 1 hour
No credit check required; explicitly welcomes applicants with bad credit and bankruptcies
Keep your vehicle while repaying; borrowers retain driving privileges during loan term
Quick pre-approval in under 5 minutes online; described as fast, secure, and free
High Google rating (4.5 stars) with specific praise for responsive customer service and clear explanations
Wide loan amount range ($100–$50,000) accommodates both small and larger emergency needs
24/7 access and convenient hours for working professionals; multiple physical locations
cons: Title loans are high-cost debt; no APR or interest rate disclosed on website despite regulatory importance
Collateral-based lending carries repossession risk if payments are missed, despite ability to keep the car during good standing
Funds delivered as check (not cash), per customer review—may delay actual access to money vs. advertised 'cash'
Borrowers must own vehicle outright with clear title; vehicle equity assessment may limit approval or loan amount
Website makes multiple unverified claims (e.g., '375,000+ people helped since 2007') without third-party substantiation
best_for: Borrowers with poor credit who are denied traditional personal loans and need emergency funds quickly
Vehicle owners facing short-term cash shortages who want to avoid losing transportation access
People with no credit history or recent bankruptcies seeking immediate lending options
Individuals needing amounts between $1,000–$10,000 with same-day or next-day funding requirements
diagnosis: Montana Capital is best for borrowers with damaged credit or no traditional lending options who own a vehicle outright and need emergency cash within 24 hours. The main caveat is that title loans are high-cost debt products—no APR is disclosed on the website, but borrowers should expect significantly higher interest rates than personal loans, and vehicle repossession remains a risk if payments are missed.
services: Online title loan application and pre-approval in under 5 minutes
Same-day to next-day funding via direct deposit or check
In-person loan origination at multiple physical locations
Title loan amounts from $100 to $50,000 based on vehicle equity
No credit check required; credit history not a factor in approval
Payment plan customization to suit individual borrower needs
SMS payment reminders and loan management support
Simple payoff process and title release upon final payment
Vehicle ownership retention during loan repayment period
meta_description: Montana Capital Car Title Loans at 2645 N Miro St, New Orleans, LA. Quick car title loans available.
